Re-election campaign for Mayor of Hilton Head Island

Protecting Our Island. Continuing the Progress.

Alan Perry’s campaign is focused on thoughtful growth, public safety, resilient infrastructure, stormwater management, environmental stewardship, transparent communication, and collaborative leadership that keeps Hilton Head Island strong.

See the Record Get Involved

Focus

Island First

Style

Practical

Approach

Collaborative

Progress During This Term

During Mayor Perry’s term, the Town Council adopted and advanced a number of important initiatives shaped by public input, Town staff expertise, and community partners. The work below reflects collaborative municipal leadership and steady progress on long-term priorities.

FY2026–2028 Strategic Action Plan

Town Council adopted a forward-looking strategic framework to guide priorities, accountability, and public reporting across major Town functions.

Fire Rescue, EOC, and Dispatch Planning

Planning advanced for a consolidated Fire Rescue Headquarters, Emergency Operations Center, and Dispatch Center to improve coordination and readiness.

Local Procurement Access

The Town expanded procurement opportunities for local, small, and minority-owned businesses to support a broader and more resilient local economy.

A-Tax and Affiliated Agencies

Improvements were made to accommodations tax grant and affiliated-agency processes to strengthen transparency, clarity, and administration.

Beach Renourishment Strategy

Long-term beach renourishment planning and funding strategy remained a priority to protect the island’s shoreline, tourism economy, and resilience.

Integrated Pest Management & Dashboards

The Town adopted South Carolina’s first municipal Integrated Pest Management Policy and launched public dashboards for strategy, capital projects, and budget progress.

Note: Major initiatives are accomplished through collaboration among the Mayor, Town Council, Town staff, and community partners.

Campaign Priorities

A practical agenda for protecting Hilton Head Island’s character while planning responsibly for the future.

Protect Island Character

Keep Hilton Head Island’s natural beauty, scale, and community identity at the center of every decision.

Manage Growth Thoughtfully

Use careful planning, clear standards, and public process to guide development that fits the island.

Strengthen Public Safety & Resilience

Support emergency readiness, modern facilities, and coordinated response for storms and public safety needs.

Invest in Stormwater & Infrastructure

Prioritize drainage, roads, and capital planning that protect neighborhoods and improve reliability.

Support Local Economic Opportunity

Expand access for local businesses and strengthen a diverse, island-based economy.

Keep Residents Informed

Maintain transparent communication, public dashboards, and steady updates people can trust.

About Alan Perry

Alan Perry is a longtime Hilton Head Island resident who was elected Mayor in November 2022. Before serving as Mayor, he served on the Town Planning Commission, including as vice chair. His campaign is rooted in public service, local knowledge, and a practical approach to leadership.

The focus remains on careful planning, honest communication, and decisions that reflect the needs of residents, businesses, and the island’s long-term future.

Leadership values

  • • Collaborative decision-making
  • • Transparent public process
  • • Respect for island character
  • • Preparedness and resilience
